gedcom-x
  • gedcom-x 0.5.5 documentation
  • View page source

gedcom-x 0.5.5 documentation

Module for handling genealogical data in the Gedcom-X V1 Specification

  • Currently in Beta, Basline GedcomX Specification is implimnet in objects for most Type Classes

  • Serializtion/Deserializtion in JSON format only.

  • Contains object for working with and converting, GEDCOM 5.x, and GEDCOM 7 format files and data

Currently working on

  • Cleaning up GEDCOM5x Objects and Conversion

  • Implimenting GEDCOM 7 Objects and Conversion

  • Unified Logging

  • Unified documentation
